name: Do I need a lawyer for simple work injury in Cottonwood Heights?
description: Yes for disputes; no for smooth claims.[7]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for simple work injury in Cottonwood Heights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for disputes; no for smooth claims.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not always, but recommended for denials, hearings, third-party, or pre-existing issues.[7] Attorneys negotiate liens, maximize value.[1] Key factors: complex cases disadvantage without.[7] Free consults common.
